subject: Transcript: Weekly sync — MPR x Samprand (2026-06-08)
body:
Attendees: Dana (MPR), Julia (MPR), James (Samprand)

Dana: ...so the main thing for this week is the notifications backlog.
James: Understood. And the push notification opt-out?
Dana: Yes — we agreed legal needs an explicit opt-out toggle in user settings before the July release. That's a commitment now, not a nice-to-have.
Julia: I'll send the copy for the toggle label by Wednesday.
James: Great, we'll ticket the opt-out toggle and schedule it ahead of the release.
Dana: Perfect. Nothing else from us.
